name: Dusty Pete
description: A grizzled old-timer with sun-baked skin and squinting eyes. He seems to be listening intently to everything around him.

name: Feral pig
description: A squat, muscular pig with coarse dark bristles and small, furious eyes. Its tusks are chipped and yellowed. It smells terrible.

name: Earl
shortDescription: a heavyset man behind a folding table
description: A heavyset man in a stained trucker cap sits behind a folding table piled with dubious merchandise. He watches you with shrewd, calculating eyes.
